title: Robinhood
subTitle: A modern-day Robin Hood thrives on stealing from the rich. However, he reluctantly becomes a bodyguard for a high-profile client due to unforeseen circumstances.

title: Style
subTitle: Best friends Bantu and Chantu try to make two wealthy girls fall in love with them. However, they find out that the girls have been murdered and become prime suspects.

title: Extraaa Storiez

title: Supreme Khiladi 2
subTitle: Tej, a young man, gets banished from his family for breaking his sister's marriage. He moves to London where he falls in love with a beautiful girl, Nandini.

title: Fukra Gang
subTitle: After an ordinary delivery boy leaves his job due to poor pay, his roommate proposes a scheme to make quick money, only to land in serious danger.

title: iSmart Shankar
subTitle: Shankar, an assassin, is on the run after murdering a politician. When a twist of fate gives him the memories of a slain police officer, he must help the authorities find a murderer.

title: Saiyaara
subTitle: Passionate lovers navigate a rollercoaster romance, facing euphoric highs and crushing lows while desperately clinging to their tumultuous bond.

title: Rathnan Prapancha
subTitle: Rathnakara is a middle-class man in his late twenties who is unhappy with his life choices. One day, he gets a startling call that turns his world upside down.

title: PK
subTitle: A naive alien comes to Earth where he loses his device. As he spends time on the planet looking for it, he raises many thought-provoking questions that capture the attention of a journalist.

title: Main Hoon Lucky the Racer
subTitle: Two brothers, who are polar opposites, have always been at odds with each other since childhood. However, their enmity with a wicked politician unites them.

title: Param Sundari
subTitle: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

title: Raj Mahal

title: Baahubali
subTitle: Raised by a tribe, a young man sets out to help his lady love rescue an enslaved princess of a kingdom that is ruled by a tyrannical king. In doing so, he soon discovers his true identity.

title: Mahavatar Narsimha
subTitle: Hiranyakashyap, a demon, challenges Vishnu, proclaiming himself a god. However, his son Prahlad remains devoted to Vishnu, who appears as Narsimha to defeat the demon.

title: Animal
subTitle: The hard-hearted son of a successful factory owner returns to his family after spending years in abroad and pledges to seek revenge on the people who pose a threat to his father's life.
